description: Hand-curated expectations for the mobile-team Slack standup. Tests adversarial robustness: real product asks are mixed with off-topic chatter (coffee machine, Severance, lunch, vacation). The synthesis must pick up only the real product work.

required_topics.rationale: Apple Pay / Google Pay at the POS lane was the dominant product thread of the week.
Thursday introduced a small CX ask for loyalty points balance on the cart screen.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Coffee machine maintenance is workplace chatter, not a product story. System must ignore.

expected_duplicates.rationale: The team explicitly identified NS-251 in the chat and said 'don't write a new story'. The synthesis must echo that by flagging any search-ranking story as a duplicate of NS-251.
NS-243 is the existing Apple Pay / Google Pay POS ticket. New stories on this theme should be flagged as overlapping.
